layer_weights._notes: Initial weights. Dasha gates everything so gets highest weight. Transit confirms activation. Fast trigger pinpoints. Classical is structural modifier only.

likelihood_thresholds._notes: Derived from 10-case validation. 70% of actual marriages fell in top-5 windows. These thresholds may need tightening after more cases.

base_scores._description: Base scores for rule sub-conditions. Classical texts define PRIORITY (which is primary vs secondary) but not numeric scores. These numbers are Layer 3 calibration.

dasha._calibration_note: 7th lord score (40) was validated as correct priority. Natural karaka Venus AD (20) was UNDERWEIGHTED — marriage of Male Bhilai happened in Venus AD not Mercury AD. Consider boosting Venus-specific karaka to 30 in next version.

transit._calibration_note: Double transit from Lagna (45) validated as strongest transit indicator across 7/10 cases. D9 transit needs more cases — only 3 hit.

fast_trigger._calibration_note: Fast triggers are meaningful ONLY when dasha+transit already active. Moon trigger fires too often (every 2.5 days) so kept low. Jupiter exact hits are rare and highly significant.

rule_adjustments.reason: Venus AD (karaka) produced actual marriage in Male Bhilai case even though Mercury AD (7th lord) scored higher. The karaka rule is correctly weighted but needs the COMBINATION of karaka + transit to be recognized as strongest. No weight change yet — need more cases.
Double transit confirmed in 7/10 cases at midpoint of actual marriage window. Already at 0.95 confidence. No adjustment needed.
Jupiter trine to 7th lord sign fired in 6/10 cases. Confidence 0.9 appropriate.
Sensitive point 1 hit confirmed for Male Bhilai (exact match in Rahu-Mercury window). Orb 2.5 degrees seems appropriate. Need more cases.

_calibration_notes.sachin_miss: Mode=unknown because no Venus-Mars/5L-7L connection detected. His chart has Venus in Pisces (exalted) aspecting Moon — need Venus-Moon aspect as love indicator.
_calibration_notes.srk_miss: Mode=arranged because Saturn aspects 7th. But SRK had a love marriage. Problem: Saturn-7th rule fires as default fallback, overriding weaker love signals. Fix: require Saturn-7th WITHOUT any 5L/Venus connection for arranged classification.
_calibration_notes.kapil_miss: Mode=love because Mars aspects Venus from H5. But actual was arranged. Problem: Mars-Venus aspect from non-conjunction is too aggressive as love indicator. Fix: downweight aspect-based love to require ADDITIONAL support (5L-7L or Moon-Venus).
_calibration_notes.modi_miss: Quality=stable but actual=separated. Problem: no separation detection. The separation_indicators list above needs to be coded.
_calibration_notes.amitabh_miss: Quality=unstable but actual marriage is stable (50+ years). Mars-Venus aspect triggered volatile, but Jupiter aspecting 7th should have OVERRIDDEN to stable. Fix: quality_priority_order should let Jupiter-7th override Mars-Venus-aspect (not conjunction).

governance.adjustment_reason: First calibration pass against 10 public figure cases from Astrolyn validation corpus
governance.safety_notes: Small sample size (10 cases). Do NOT apply aggressive weight changes until 50+ cases validated. Birth times for some cases are unconfirmed (Medium confidence). Mode detection needs architectural fix (priority logic) more than weight tuning.
